title: Devision
description: Job Matching & Recruitment Platform. Designed and implemented a microservices architecture for applicant and employer management systems. Built an event-driven data integration pipeline using Apache Kafka to synchronize data across services. Developed the frontend with Headless UI for customizable and accessible UI components. Enabled real-time job and candidate notifications to improve recruitment responsiveness.

title: Scootr.io
description: Scootr.io is a real-time smart mobility platform that lets users find, book, ride, and return scooters through an intuitive web interface and a Raspberry Pi backend system. It supports role-based logins for customers, admins, and engineers, and integrates services like Google Calendar, Stripe, and cloud-based MySQL for seamless functionality.

title: FACP Monitoring System
description: Built an industrial Fire Alarm Control Panel (FACP) monitoring system using BACnet UDP for device communication, AWS IoT Core with MQTT for cloud data transmission, a backend service for data processing, and WebSocket for real-time frontend updates. The system allows operators to monitor alarm status, device conditions, and system events in real time through a web-based dashboard. Developed for EVN Industry to improve monitoring reliability and centralized system visibility.

title: SmartESP - House Controlling IoT System
description: SmartESP is an IoT-based project designed to simulate a smart home environment using an ESP32 microcontroller and the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). This project allows users to remotely control and monitor devices such as LED lights, fans, and sensors, creating a seamless and intelligent home automation experience.
builtFor: Ho Chi Minh City University of Agriculture and Forestry Collaboration

title: Rent Mate
description: The RentMate Smart Rental Property Management System is a web-based platform designed to streamline rental operations for landlords, tenants, and property managers. Its primary purpose is to centralize the management of rental properties by integrating property listings, lease management, communication, payments, maintenance requests, and document handling into a single unified system. RentMate aims to address common challenges in the rental ecosystem—such as fragmented communication, manual payment tracking, inefficient maintenance coordination, and limited visibility into rental activities—by providing an intuitive, secure, and modern digital solution. The product supports the full lifecycle of rental interactions, from listing and searching for properties to managing active tenancies and historical records.

title: Arduino RC Car
description: A remote-controlled car built using an Mini Arduino, Bluetooth module, motor control board, and the Dabble mobile app library. The car is controlled wirelessly via a smartphone, allowing real-time movement control through Bluetooth communication. This project demonstrates embedded systems development, wireless communication, and hardware-software integration.
